architecture.details: Router->Service->Model, sync only, no direct DB in router

security.details: EncryptedText, Pydantic validation, auth on all endpoints, no SQL injection

correctness.details: Status transitions validated, dedup in generate, self-duplicate guard

tests.details: 13/13 tests passing, coverage: generation, filtering, lifecycle, duplicates

migration.details: batch_alter_table SQLite compat, proper FK + indexes
